# Signal fields

Authoritative source: [`schema/signal.schema.json`](../../schema/signal.schema.json).
“Required” means required in a loader insert; database-generated fields remain optional.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| `id` | no | string \| null | uuid | UUID primary key — generated by the database; never supply on insert. |
| `created_at` | no | string \| null | date-time | Row insertion time (ISO 8601) — set by the database. |
| `idempotency_key` | no | string \| null | min 1 chars; max 200 chars | Stable per-module key for deduplicating transport retries or repeated upstream items. |
| `observed_at` | no | string \| null | date-time | When the underlying event was observed in the real world (ISO 8601). |
| `reported_at` | no | string \| null | date-time | When the source reported/published the event (ISO 8601). |
| `source` | no | string \| null | max 200 chars | Human-readable origin, e.g. 'GeoNet', 'NZTA Journey Planner', 'community report'. |
| `source_type` | yes | string | one of: official, community, media, sensor | Class of source. |
| `signal_type` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 100 chars | Module-chosen event category, kebab-case, e.g. 'flooding', 'outage', 'road-closure'. Also drives the manifest's homeStat.signalType filter. |
| `title` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 200 chars | Short headline shown on the feed card and map popup. |
| `description` | no | string \| null | max 2000 chars | Longer free-text detail. |
| `lat` | no | number \| null | ≥ -90; ≤ 90 | WGS84 latitude. Null for non-geolocated signals. |
| `lng` | no | number \| null | ≥ -180; ≤ 180 | WGS84 longitude. Null for non-geolocated signals. |
| `place_name` | no | string \| null | max 200 chars | Human-readable place, e.g. 'Ōwhiro Bay', 'Lambton Quay'. |
| `severity` | no | string | one of: minor, moderate, severe, extreme, unknown; default: "unknown" | CAP-aligned severity. |
| `verification` | no | string | one of: unverified, corroborated, verified, false_report; default: "unverified" | Triage/verification state. Only updatable post-insert by authenticated users (RLS). |
| `confidence` | no | number \| null | ≥ 0; ≤ 1 | 0-1 confidence score (e.g. from corroboration or ask_claude classification). |
| `link` | no | string \| null | uri; max 2000 chars | URL to the source item. |
| `media_urls` | no | array<string> | default: []; items: uri | Public URLs into the shared media bucket (media/<module_id>/...). |
| `module_id` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 100 chars | Owning module's id (= folder name under modules/). Must reference an ENABLED row in the modules table or the insert is rejected by RLS. |
| `raw` | no | object \| null | — | Original upstream payload (jsonb) for debugging/handover. |
